name: infernal-court
summary: An audience chamber in the Nine Hells — chains replace heraldry, fire replaces torchlight, and the seat of power is a tyrant's iron pulpit. Everything signals dominion through suffering.

accent.purpose: dais or molten channel in front of the throne

primary_palette.note: contract-broker, the pulpit IS the altar
bureaucratic devil — the writ outranks any seat

story_prompts: a devil prince holds audience for a mortal petitioner — chained supplicants line the walls
contract signing ceremony, the pedestal glowing, witnesses gibbeted at the sides
empty between courts — chains sway, braziers banked low, a single soul-coin on the floor
sacked by a rival — throne split, banners burning, the master fled to another layer
trial of a fallen pit fiend, the seat turned AWAY from the door in ritual shame

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: dim infernal (0.25-0.35) with deep orange-red ambient color

anti_patterns: don't use warm yellow candlelight — infernal light is orange-red, almost bloody
never center the throne; it belongs at the far wall with a processional path
no wood — everything here is iron, bone, obsidian, or stone
chains should hang from the walls and ceiling, not be stacked on the floor like rope
